_comment: Demo-mode fallback for the Risk Feed POC. Each item ships a synthetic_payload that POSTs directly to /coa/generate (no orchestrator). Categories: company_sanctions, people_sanctions, markets.

items.headline: OFAC adds Sinno Electronics Co. Ltd. to SDN list under SDGT program

synthetic_payload.executive_summary: OFAC added Sinno Electronics Co. Ltd. (Shenzhen, China) to the SDN list on 2026-04-28 under the SDGT (Specially Designated Global Terrorist) program for facilitating procurement of dual-use semiconductor components for sanctioned end-users in Iran.
key_findings: SDN program codes: SDGT, IRAN-EO13902
Listed address: Futian District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
Aliases: Sinno Electronics; Sinno HK; SHENZHEN SINNO
Reported HK subsidiary acts as procurement front per Treasury press release

sources_used.name: OFAC SDN List
sources_used.description: U.S. Treasury Specially Designated Nationals List — added 2026-04-28 under SDGT/IRAN-EO13902

sources_used.name: Treasury Press Release
sources_used.description: Treasury announcement detailing procurement network for Iranian end-users

items.headline: OFAC designates Volga-Dnepr Gulf FZE for sanctions evasion via UAE re-export

synthetic_payload.executive_summary: OFAC designated Volga-Dnepr Gulf FZE (Sharjah, UAE) on 2026-04-28 under RUSSIA-EO14024 for serving as a re-export hub moving sanctioned aerospace components to Russian state aviation entities.
key_findings: SDN program codes: RUSSIA-EO14024
Listed address: Sharjah Airport International Free Zone, UAE
Linked to parent Volga-Dnepr Group already on SSI list since 2022

sources_used.name: OFAC SDN List
sources_used.description: U.S. Treasury SDN — added 2026-04-28 under RUSSIA-EO14024

sources_used.name: Treasury Russia Sanctions Action Notice
sources_used.description: Treasury notice describing UAE re-export pipeline to Russian aerospace

items.headline: OFAC adds Pearl Harvest Trading (HK) to SDN under NK-related program

synthetic_payload.executive_summary: OFAC added Pearl Harvest Trading (HK) Ltd. on 2026-04-28 under DPRK-EO13722 for laundering proceeds of North Korean cyber operations through Hong Kong virtual asset service providers.
key_findings: SDN program codes: DPRK-EO13722, CYBER2
Listed address: Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
Sanctions cite >$45M in laundered virtual asset volume FY24-FY25

sources_used.name: OFAC SDN List
sources_used.description: U.S. Treasury SDN — added 2026-04-28 under DPRK-EO13722

sources_used.name: Treasury DPRK Cyber Action
sources_used.description: Joint Treasury-DOJ action targeting DPRK virtual asset laundering

items.headline: OFAC sanctions Mahmoud Hassan Khalil, IRGC-QF financial facilitator

synthetic_payload.executive_summary: OFAC designated Mahmoud Hassan Khalil on 2026-04-28 under SDGT and IRGC-related authorities for moving Iranian crude oil revenue to Hizballah procurement networks via Lebanese exchange houses.
key_findings: SDN program codes: SDGT, IFSR
Listed nationality: Lebanon; DOB 1971
Treasury alleges role as IRGC-QF Beirut financial facilitator since 2019

sources_used.name: OFAC SDN List
sources_used.description: U.S. Treasury SDN — individual added 2026-04-28 under SDGT/IFSR

sources_used.name: Treasury IRGC-QF Action
sources_used.description: Treasury announcement targeting IRGC-QF Beirut financial network

items.headline: OFAC adds two Russian oligarchs to SDN under EO14024

synthetic_payload.executive_summary: OFAC sanctioned Igor Petrovich Volkov on 2026-04-28 under RUSSIA-EO14024 for ongoing material support to the Russian Federation's defense-industrial base via privately held metallurgy holdings.
key_findings: SDN program codes: RUSSIA-EO14024
Listed nationality: Russia; DOB 1962
Reported beneficial ownership of two metallurgy plants supplying Rostec subsidiaries

sources_used.name: OFAC SDN List
sources_used.description: U.S. Treasury SDN — individual added 2026-04-28 under RUSSIA-EO14024

items.headline: Treasury designates Venezuelan judge for corruption under GLOMAG

synthetic_payload.executive_summary: OFAC sanctioned Venezuelan judge Carmen Elena Briceno Rivas on 2026-04-28 under the Global Magnitsky (GLOMAG) authority for issuing rulings shielding Maduro-aligned officials from corruption probes.
key_findings: SDN program codes: GLOMAG
Listed nationality: Venezuela; DOB 1968
State Department parallel visa restrictions announced same day

sources_used.name: OFAC SDN List
sources_used.description: U.S. Treasury SDN — individual added 2026-04-28 under GLOMAG

sources_used.name: Treasury GLOMAG Action Notice
sources_used.description: Treasury announcement on Venezuelan judicial corruption

items.headline: ASML drops 6.4% intraday on China export-license curtailment headlines

synthetic_payload.executive_summary: ASML shares fell 6.4% on 2026-04-29 after Reuters reported the Dutch government will not renew DUV export licenses to two Chinese fab customers, reigniting semiconductor decoupling concerns.
key_findings: Intraday move: -6.4% on 3.1x average volume
Reuters reports Dutch government decision affects two named Chinese customers
Sector spillover: SOX index -2.1% on the session
GDELT tone for ASML coverage: -3.8 (vs. trailing 30-day mean of -0.4)

sources_used.name: Reuters — ASML China license
sources_used.description: Reuters article reporting non-renewal of Dutch DUV export licenses to Chinese fabs

sources_used.name: yfinance — ASML intraday
sources_used.description: Intraday price/volume snapshot for ASML on 2026-04-29

items.headline: Brent crude up 4.2% on reports of Strait of Hormuz tanker incidents

synthetic_payload.executive_summary: Brent crude rose 4.2% on 2026-04-29 amid wire reports of two tanker hull-puncture incidents near the Strait of Hormuz, sharpening concerns over Gulf shipping insurance and Iran-aligned harassment.
key_findings: Intraday move: +4.2% in front-month Brent contract
Two tanker incidents reported within 18 hours per Bloomberg
GDELT tone for 'Hormuz' coverage: -4.6 vs trailing 30-day mean -1.1
P&I insurance premia for Gulf transits reportedly +35% week-over-week

sources_used.name: Bloomberg — Hormuz incidents
sources_used.description: Bloomberg coverage of two reported tanker incidents in Strait of Hormuz approach

items.headline: Lockheed Martin (LMT) +3.8% after House passes supplemental defense package

synthetic_payload.executive_summary: Lockheed Martin shares rose 3.8% on 2026-04-29 after the U.S. House passed a $42B supplemental defense package emphasizing Patriot, JASSM, and HIMARS production restocking.
key_findings: Intraday move: LMT +3.8%, RTX +2.4%, GD +2.1%
Bill text earmarks Patriot interceptor and JASSM-ER lots
Vote margin: 312-119 (House)
Senate passage expected mid-week per WSJ

sources_used.name: WSJ — Defense supplemental House vote
sources_used.description: WSJ reporting on House passage of supplemental defense package
